subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! Thy letter was received and perused with careful attention. Render thou praise unto God that in the Covenant [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان نامه شما رسید و بدقت ملاحظه گردید حمد کن خدا را که بر میثاق
subcodes.subjects: @firmness in the Covenant, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @service to others; to the Cause of God
